account_profile.purpose: scan-engine training corpus — single composite account (set #4)
regions_covered: international travel (Mexico — Cozumel/Cancun, UK via EU wire)
account_profile.currency_convention: All amounts in USD-equivalent. Foreign-origin transactions include 'FX <CURRENCY> <NATIVE_AMOUNT> @ <RATE>' in the descriptor.
account_profile.variance_notes: Set #4 — variance seed re-rolled. Southeast US base (Atlanta/Buckhead/Smyrna) + Eastern Canada roadtrip (Toronto/Ottawa/Winnipeg/Halifax) + Mexico cruise (Cozumel/Cancun). Demographic flavor: retired couple, both SSA + pension, Etsy side shop + Rover/TaskRabbit gigs, adult children + grandkids, paid-off home + rental property. Fraud emphasis: skimmer pattern at gas station (resolved via dispute), card-testing micro-charges, velocity spike on Amazon, suspected-duplicate Starbucks, geo-jump anomaly, multiple merchant-spoofing typos (AMAZ0N, NETFL1X, MICROS0FT). Subscription emphasis: heavy annual subs (AARP, AAA, Costco, TurboTax, Amazon Prime), price DECREASE (Disney+ downgrade), pause/resume (Gold's Gym during travel), family plan split (Verizon 5-line with adult kids), forgotten cancellation (Audible stops Jan). Travel insurance, Medigap+Part D, long-term care, whole life. Crypto sales more prominent (Coinbase BTC, Gemini ETH, Kraken USDC). Bipartisan political donations. Bilingual retiree religious tithing.
